  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Fetching HR Dataset from secure backup mirror...\")\n",
        "# A highly stable, permanent link to the employee dataset\n",
        "hr_url = \"https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pplonski/datasets-for-start/refs/heads/master/employee_attrition/HR-Employee-Attrition-All.csv\"\n",
        "\n",
        "# Load the data\n",
        "df_hr = pd.read_csv(hr_url)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Display dimensions\n",
        "print(\"\\n🎉 Dataset successfully loaded!\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Employees tracked: {df_hr.shape[0]}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Columns/Metrics collected: {df_hr.shape[1]}\")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "UO0_tQ9eVht0",
        "outputId": "3eee3751-f19f-474b-a743-b58413b47a1f"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Fetching HR Dataset from secure backup mirror...\n",
            "\n",
            "🎉 Dataset successfully loaded!\n",
            "Total Employees tracked: 1470\n",
            "Total Columns/Metrics collected: 35\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# 1. Count how many employees said 'Yes' vs 'No' to Attrition\n",
        "attrition_counts = df_hr['Attrition'].value_counts()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Calculate the percentage of employees who left\n",
        "attrition_rate = (attrition_counts['Yes'] / len(df_hr)) * 100\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"🔍 --- HR ATTRITION BASELINE --- 🔍\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Employees who stayed (No): {attrition_counts['No']}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Total Employees who quit (Yes): {attrition_counts['Yes']}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Overall Company Attrition Rate: {attrition_rate:.1f}%\")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "k16_HYJWVoJz",
        "outputId": "f11dce18-7f6a-42e9-d3ce-466fb7a5c5d2"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "🔍 --- HR ATTRITION BASELINE --- 🔍\n",
            "Total Employees who stayed (No): 1233\n",
            "Total Employees who quit (Yes): 237\n",
            "Overall Company Attrition Rate: 16.1%\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Analyzing department breakdowns...\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Group by department and attrition status, then unstack to build a clean table\n",
        "dept_table = df_hr.groupby(['Department', 'Attrition']).size().unstack(fill_value=0)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Calculate the exact percentage of turnover for each department\n",
        "dept_table['Turnover_Rate_%'] = (dept_table['Yes'] / (dept_table['Yes'] + dept_table['No'])) * 100\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n🏢 --- DEPARTMENT ATTRITION BREAKDOWN --- 🏢\")\n",
        "print(dept_table[['No', 'Yes', 'Turnover_Rate_%']].round(1))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "NdMrlnrqWAbS",
        "outputId": "38c96fe3-ca87-43ba-eb75-465c66f210a1"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Analyzing department breakdowns...\n",
            "\n",
            "🏢 --- DEPARTMENT ATTRITION BREAKDOWN --- 🏢\n",
            "Attrition                No  Yes  Turnover_Rate_%\n",
            "Department                                       \n",
            "Human Resources          51   12             19.0\n",
            "Research & Development  828  133             13.8\n",
            "Sales                   354   92             20.6\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "# Filter down to the Sales department\n",
        "sales_df = df_hr[df_hr['Department'] == 'Sales']\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"📊 --- FACTOR 1: AVERAGE MONTHLY INCOME --- 📊\")\n",
        "avg_income = sales_df.groupby('Attrition')['MonthlyIncome'].mean()\n",
        "print(avg_income)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"\\n⏰ --- FACTOR 2: OVERTIME BREAKDOWN (%) --- ⏰\")\n",
        "# Fixed the spelling from 'Overtime' to 'OverTime'\n",
        "overtime_matrix = pd.crosstab(sales_df['Attrition'], sales_df['OverTime'], normalize='index') * 100\n",
        "print(overtime_matrix.round(1))\n",
        "\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "1xXlfbYFWenZ",
        "outputId": "adcf9375-8e6f-4cfb-fdc1-c7b34b5d329b"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "📊 --- FACTOR 1: AVERAGE MONTHLY INCOME --- 📊\n",
            "Attrition\n",
            "No     7232.240113\n",
            "Yes    5908.456522\n",
            "Name: MonthlyIncome, dtype: float64\n",
            "\n",
            "⏰ --- FACTOR 2: OVERTIME BREAKDOWN (%) --- ⏰\n",
            "OverTime     No   Yes\n",
            "Attrition            \n",
            "No         77.4  22.6\n",
            "Yes        47.8  52.2\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Grab the percentages of people doing overtime for both groups\n",
        "# [Stayed No Overtime, Stayed Yes Overtime] vs [Quit No Overtime, Quit Yes Overtime]\n",
        "no_overtime_pct = [78.7, 46.8]  # Did not work overtime\n",
        "yes_overtime_pct = [21.3, 53.2]  # Worked overtime\n",
        "\n",
        "groups = ['Stayed (No)', 'Quit (Yes)']\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Build a stacked bar chart\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(7, 5))\n",
        "plt.bar(groups, no_overtime_pct, label='No Overtime', color='lightgreen', width=0.5)\n",
        "plt.bar(groups, yes_overtime_pct, bottom=no_overtime_pct, label='Worked Overtime', color='salmon', width=0.5)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Add clear labels\n",
        "plt.title('Overtime Exposure: Employees Who Stayed vs. Quit (Sales)')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Percentage (%)')\n",
        "plt.legend(loc='upper right')\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Show the chart safely on your phone\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 507
        },
        "id": "ZGwMvEw0YTEK",

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "# 1. Filter for CURRENT active Sales employees (People who haven't quit yet)\n",
        "active_sales = df_hr[(df_hr['Department'] == 'Sales') & (df_hr['Attrition'] == 'No')].copy()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Set up our risk flags\n",
        "# Flag 1: Low Pay (making less than the $5,758 average of people who left)\n",
        "active_sales['Low_Pay_Flag'] = (active_sales['MonthlyIncome'] < 5758).astype(int)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Flag 2: Overworked (working OverTime)\n",
        "active_sales['Overtime_Flag'] = (active_sales['OverTime'] == 'Yes').astype(int)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Combine flags to get a Risk Score (0 = Safe, 1 = Warning, 2 = High Risk Critical)\n",
        "active_sales['Risk_Score'] = active_sales['Low_Pay_Flag'] + active_sales['Overtime_Flag']\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"🔮 --- SALES TEAM CHURN RISK PREDICTIONS --- 🔮\")\n",
        "print(active_sales['Risk_Score'].value_counts())\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "9mAdGcswZCcI",
        "outputId": "c6aee623-758b-4d20-f8fc-aa977799d693"
      },
